creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Created attachment 173278
patch for pkg-message.in

Hi,

sendmail_enable="NONE" option is "deprecated and should not be used. It will be removed in a future release.", according to rc.sendmail(8) manpage:

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=rc.sendmail&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+10.3-RELEASE

Handbook's chapter "27.4. Changing the Mail Transfer Agent" also instructs to disable particular sendmail components, and not use "NONE" keyword:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/mail-changingmta.html

Perhaps postfix' pkg-message could be also corrected not to use deprecated option?
